title: histiopteris estipulata
intro: Histiopteris estipulata, also known as the New Zealand tree fern, is a type of fern that is native to New Zealand and Australia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Histiopteris estipulata include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or ointment, and is traditionally used in New Zealand and Australian traditional medicine.
